description: ShipStation is a shipping and fulfillment platform for ecommerce sellers and businesses. It helps users manage orders, compare rates, buy labels, track shipments, and coordinate fulfillment workflows across carriers and sales channels.
summary: ShipStation exposes two authenticated REST APIs—a current v2 API and a legacy v1 API—plus a public documentation MCP server at `https://docs.shipstation.com/mcp` for AI assistants.
